mapper.update: update borrow set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrow order by id desc

select count(id) as count, DATE_FORMAT(createtime,'%Y-%m-%d') as date from
borrow
retur
where createtime IS NOT NULL
AND createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 WEEK)
AND createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 2 MONTH)
AND createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
AND createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 WEEK)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createtime,'%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT * FROM borrow WHERE status = '待取书' ORDER BY createtime ASC
SELECT * FROM borrow WHERE status = '待取书' ORDER BY createtime ASC
SELECT COUNT(id) AS count, DATE_FORMAT(createtime, '%Y-%m') AS date FROM borrow WHERE book_no = #{bookNo} AND createtime IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createtime, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY date ASC
